verses.text: A great voice in heaven cries, 'Alleluia; Salvation... unto the Lord,' for He judged the great whore and avenged His servants. Alleluia. Heaven praises God's righteous judgment.
A great voice in heaven cries, 'Alleluia; Salvation... unto the Lord,' for He judged the great whore and avenged His servants. Alleluia. Heaven praises God's righteous judgment.
A great voice in heaven cries, 'Alleluia; Salvation... unto the Lord,' for He judged the great whore and avenged His servants. Alleluia. Heaven praises God's righteous judgment.
The elders and creatures fall, saying, 'Amen; Alleluia.' A voice bids all His servants praise Him. Worship. All God's people join the song.
The elders and creatures fall, saying, 'Amen; Alleluia.' A voice bids all His servants praise Him. Worship. All God's people join the song.
A voice as many waters cries, 'the Lord God omnipotent reigneth. The marriage of the Lamb is come,' His bride 'arrayed in fine linen.' The wedding. The Lamb's bride is made ready.
A voice as many waters cries, 'the Lord God omnipotent reigneth. The marriage of the Lamb is come,' His bride 'arrayed in fine linen.' The wedding. The Lamb's bride is made ready.
A voice as many waters cries, 'the Lord God omnipotent reigneth. The marriage of the Lamb is come,' His bride 'arrayed in fine linen.' The wedding. The Lamb's bride is made ready.
'Blessed are they which are called unto the marriage supper of the Lamb.' John would worship the angel, but is told, 'worship God.' Blessed guests. Worship belongs to God alone.
'Blessed are they which are called unto the marriage supper of the Lamb.' John would worship the angel, but is told, 'worship God.' Blessed guests. Worship belongs to God alone.

Heaven opened; one on 'a white horse,' called 'Faithful and True,' in righteousness 'doth judge and make war,' clothed in blood, named 'The Word of God.' The rider. Christ comes forth as conquering King.

Heaven opened; one on 'a white horse,' called 'Faithful and True,' in righteousness 'doth judge and make war,' clothed in blood, named 'The Word of God.' The rider. Christ comes forth as conquering King.

Heaven opened; one on 'a white horse,' called 'Faithful and True,' in righteousness 'doth judge and make war,' clothed in blood, named 'The Word of God.' The rider. Christ comes forth as conquering King.
The armies of heaven follow; from His mouth 'a sharp sword,' and on His robe 'KING OF KINGS, AND LORD OF LORDS.' Conqueror. He alone rules and overthrows the nations.
The armies of heaven follow; from His mouth 'a sharp sword,' and on His robe 'KING OF KINGS, AND LORD OF LORDS.' Conqueror. He alone rules and overthrows the nations.
The armies of heaven follow; from His mouth 'a sharp sword,' and on His robe 'KING OF KINGS, AND LORD OF LORDS.' Conqueror. He alone rules and overthrows the nations.
An angel calls the birds to 'the supper of the great God,' to eat the flesh of kings and captains. Grim feast. The defeated foes become carrion.
An angel calls the birds to 'the supper of the great God,' to eat the flesh of kings and captains. Grim feast. The defeated foes become carrion.
The beast and kings make war, but are taken; the beast and false prophet are 'cast alive into a lake of fire,' the rest slain. Beast defeated. Christ's enemies meet their doom.
The beast and kings make war, but are taken; the beast and false prophet are 'cast alive into a lake of fire,' the rest slain. Beast defeated. Christ's enemies meet their doom.
